mechanism_result.prespecified_subset: 15 rows frozen pre-spend: Cell 4 context-capped misses whose gold set becomes complete at top-10
mechanism_result.conversion: 0/15 correct at top-5 -> 10/15 at top-10, zero reverse flips (exact two-sided p ~ 0.002)
mechanism_result.negative_control: the 16 context-capped misses whose gold stays incomplete at top-10: 0/16 -> 1/16
mechanism_result.churn_symmetry: outside the mechanism subset flips are exactly 30 vs 30 — the whole +2.2pp is the predicted mechanism; everything else is generation drift (Cell D byte-identical band: 21 flips)

secondary_results.host_effect: Cell 4B vs archived Cell 4 (DeepSeek first-party): -1.4pp strict, p=0.43 — within the drift band; the no-train fp8 failover config is statistically indistinguishable from the retired host (artifact s3-mcnemar-c4b-vs-c4-2026-07.json)
secondary_results.provider_mix: Baidu was TPM-saturated; GMICloud served 492/500 (4B) and 400/500 (Cell 8), StreamLake 6 -> 91. Flip rate by provider is flat (GMICloud 15%, StreamLake 13%) — mix shift does not explain flips
secondary_results.by_type: multi-session +6.0pp, temporal-reasoning +3.8pp, knowledge-update +1.2pp; single-session-preference REGRESSED 40.0% -> 26.7% strict (3 impr / 7 regr, p=0.34; 4 of 7 regressions hedged to partial) — context dilution on single-gold-session questions
secondary_results.abstention_guardrail: 4/30 -> 4/30 incorrect on *_abs rows; 2 newly incorrect, offset by 2 newly correct — neutral

verdict.reason: Fails the pre-registered significance bar; costs 1.59x gen input for a gain confined entirely to the 15 gold-completion rows while doubling context for the other 485 (and directionally hurting preference questions).
verdict.validated_lever: Session-completeness-aware widening: the causal mechanism (complete the gold session set in context) is confirmed at 10/15 conversion with zero downside on those rows. Widen PAST top-5 only when coverage signals say the evidence set is likely incomplete; never for single-session-preference. Runtime-computable signals: question intent class (multi-session/temporal benefit; the intent classifier already exists for synthesis), retrieval score continuation past rank 5.
verdict.expected_value: ~+2pp strict of the +3.0pp mechanical ceiling at a small fraction of the 1.59x token overhead, without the preference-dilution exposure
